text.title: Software Development Best Practices 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the stack TS or Python AND repo >100 LOC?

text.example: Repo X audit → ts-strict OFF, py-313-strict 18 errors, no pre-commit → priority queue: 1) ts-strict flip + fix, 2) ruff + mypy in CI, 3) pre-commit hooks → 3 PRs, baseline locked at .aidocs/audits/2026-q2.md.
